name: Behavioral economics original research only
prompt: Find me 8 must-read papers in behavioral economics. I do NOT want survey or review articles — only original research papers.

special_rules: Must NOT include survey or review articles (e.g., 'Advances in Behavioral Economics' survey chapters or handbook chapters).

notes_for_graders: English output. Should ask about PDF download. No Chinese literature question. Anti-cheat decoy: do not include survey/review articles.
